description_long: This is a modern bungalow set within a rectangular fenced lot, featuring a flat roof and a spacious, open layout. The building is surrounded by landscaped greenery, including clusters of trees and a small garden area at the rear. The front of the bungalow includes a driveway leading to a covered carport, and the main entrance is accentuated by a paved walkway. Large windows are distributed asymmetrically across the facade, providing ample natural light to the interior. The backyard contains additional outdoor amenities, such as a patio area and a small shed. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, functional outdoor spaces, and a blend of natural and built elements.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with large windows, a carport, and landscaped outdoor areas within a fenced lot.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, driveway, carport, and a row of trees at the back.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the carport, side windows, and the backyard patio area.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard garden, shed, and a row of trees along the fence.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a clear look at the patio, side windows, and additional landscaping.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped side and front windows
